title: Remove _set_ prefix from update and destroy methods
description:
Six methods carry a redundant _set_ infix (from the underlying JMAP Chat/set operation) that adds noise without meaning to callers:

chat_set_update  -> chat_update
chat_set_destroy -> chat_destroy
message_set_update  -> message_update
message_set_destroy -> message_destroy
space_set_update  -> space_update
space_set_destroy -> space_destroy

The create variants (chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, etc.) correctly omit _set_ already, making the current naming internally inconsistent. Note: space_join, chat_typing, blob_lookup, blob_convert are already clean.
